assessment_note: This video is an instructional/documentary presentation about Dr. Jyoti Mishra and laparoscopic surgical training programs. It is NOT a performance video of an FLS task.
content_observed: Dr. Jyoti Mishra credentials and biography (Gynae Endoscopic Surgeon, FOGSI Endoscopy Trainer, Associate Director at Jaypee Hospital)
Series of interview frames with Dr. Mishra speaking in her office
Text overlays: 'Strong foundation by clear fundamentals', 'Aiming beyond teaching', 'Surgical training options', 'Online Step by step training'
Excel Academy of Laparoscopy Training logo with tagline 'Step by Step Learning'
Photograph from 2017 Endofert conference showing surgical team
cannot_score_reason: This is an educational/promotional video about a laparoscopic training academy and instructor. It contains no actual FLS task performance (no Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, or Suture tasks being timed and evaluated). The surgical footage shown is real operative video, not FLS simulator training.
